title: Marka
content:
{{Top|ga|leg}} {{Youmay|Marka, [[Sith apprentice/Legends|Sith apprentice]] to [[Finn (Sith)|Finn]]|[[Marka Ragnos]], the ancient [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lord of the Sith]]}} {{Character |type=Sith |image=[[File:Marka2.jpg]] |name=Marka |homeworld= |birth= |death= |species=[[Human/Legends|Human]]{{Tales|17|The Apprentice (comic story)}} |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Female]] |pronouns=new |height= |mass= |hair=[[Color/Legends|Blue]] |feathers= |eyes=Blue; red {{C|[[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side]]}} |skin=Light |cyber= |families= |parents= |partners= |siblings= |children= |affiliation=[[Sith/Legends|Sith]] |masters=[[Finn (Sith)|Finn]] {{C|[[Sith Master/Legends|Sith Master]]}} |apprentices= }} {{Quote|Master, I…''"
"''Take me with you. I want to learn. I can learn.|Finn's Sith apprentice and Marka|}} '''Marka''' was a [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] who was [[Slavery/Legends|enslaved]] to the [[Toydarian/Legends|Toydarian]] [[Lod]]. During the final [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[New Sith Wars]], she encountered the [[Sith Master/Legends|Sith Master]] [[Finn (Sith)|Finn]] and [[Finn's Sith apprentice|his apprentice]]. After Lod struck Marka for disobeying her, the [[Sith apprentice/Legends|apprentice]] [[Death/Legends|killed]] the Toydarian, freeing her. She used a [[Mind trick/Legends|mind trick]] on the young man in an attempt to convince him to take her with the [[Sith/Legends|Sith]], and she then followed the two Sith to their [[Starship/Legends|starship]] and begged Finn to allow her to accompany them. When the Sith Master refused, citing the fact that he already had an apprentice, Marka seized the apprentice's [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] and pushed him off the building's docking pad, murdering him. With his death, she assumed the role of Finn's new Sith apprentice. ==Biography== {{Quote|She's still following us, Master."''
"''I know. Perhaps she is why we came to this dreadful place. There is no such thing as coincidence."''
"''I must deal with her."''
"''Yes. Deal with her.|The male Sith apprentice and Finn, regarding Marka|}} [[File:TheApprentice1.jpg|thumb|left|200px|Finn's Sith apprentice kills Marka's slave master, Lod.]] Marka, a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]], was [[Slavery/Legends|enslaved]] by the [[Toydarian/Legends|Toydarian]] [[Lod]] during the final [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[New Sith Wars]].{{CSWECite|II|290|Marka}} She and Lod encountered the [[Sith Master/Legends|Sith Master]] [[Finn (Sith)|Finn]] and [[Finn's Sith apprentice|his apprentice]] on a [[Unidentified planet (Finn)|planet]] shortly after they destroyed a building. Lod ordered Marka to impress the men by showing them her [[Tooth/Legends|teeth]]; however, she refused. Lod struck her, and Finn's apprentice helped Marka to her feet, swearing that Lod would not hit her again. As Lod conversed with Finn, the young man [[Death/Legends|killed]] the Toydarian, freeing Marka. After Finn rebuked him for helping Marka, she thanked the man and used a [[Mind trick/Legends|mind trick]] on the apprentice in an attempt to convince him to take her with the [[Sith/Legends|Sith]]. She followed the apprentice as he went to tell Finn that she was [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]], and the Sith Master ordered his pupil to deal with Marka. However, she and the apprentice pursued Finn up the [[Turbolift/Legends|turbolift]] which led to the docking pad where the Sith's [[Starship/Legends|starship]] was. Marka begged Finn to allow her to accompany them, saying that she could learn the Sith ways, but Finn refused, citing that he already had an apprentice and had no use for a slave. In order to overcome this obstacle, Marka seized the apprentice's lightsaber and threw him off the docking pad, sending him plummeting to his death. Marka then assumed the role of Finn's new Sith apprentice. ==Personality and traits== {{Quote|Thank you for freeing me. Please take me with you.''"
"''I…uh…must go…|Marka and Finn's Sith apprentice|}} [[File:TheApprentice2.jpg|thumb|right|130px|Marka, just prior to murdering Finn's Sith apprentice]] When Finn's apprentice killed Lod and freed Marka, she was grateful for his actions, but she also attempted to convince him to take her with the Sith. After Finn initially refused to allow her to accompany them due to the fact that he had a pupil, she murdered the man who freed her from slavery in order to become Finn's apprentice. After becoming Finn's apprentice, he demanded absolute loyalty from Marka. ==Powers and abilities== {{Quote|Master…that girl…she…uh…I mean…''"
"''She tried a Force mind trick on you? Did you not sense it when they approached? The Force is powerful with her.|The male Sith apprentice and Finn|}} Marka was noted by Finn as powerful with the Force; the Sith Master was able to sense her ability when she and Lod approached him and his apprentice. Marka was able to use the mind trick ability, and utilized it on Finn's Sith apprentice. She also was able to kill [[Finn's Sith apprentice|Finn's apprentice]] with a sneak attack. ==Behind the scenes== Marka first appeared in the short [[Star Wars comic books|comic]] "[[The Apprentice (comic story)|The Apprentice]]," which was featured in [[Star Wars Tales 17|''Star Wars Tales'' 17]], a comic written by [[Mike Denning]], illustrated by [[David Nakayama]] and released on [[October 1]], [[2003]].{{Marvel|url=comics/issue/53995/star_wars_tales_1999_17|text=Star Wars Tales (1999) #17}} Plausible stories in [[Star Wars Tales 1|''Star Wars Tales'' 1]]–''[[Star Wars Tales 20|20]]'' were initially viewed as [[Canon|S-canon]] until referenced in a non-''Tales'' source, at which point the subject matter was elevated to C-canon status.{{SWBoards|url=thread.jspa?threadID=152583&start=752#14952461|thread=Holocron continuity database questions|user=[[Leland Chee|Leland Y Chee]]|date=2006-06-04|time=3:05 AM}} Marka received an entry in ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'', elevating the character's appearance in ''The Apprentice'' to C-canon. ==Appearances== {{Mediacat|imagecat=Images of Marka}} *{{Tales|17|The Apprentice (comic story)}} {{1st}} ==Sources== *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Marka |es=Darth Marka |pl=Marka }} [[Category:Enslaved individuals]] [[Category:Females]] [[Category:Humans]] [[Category:Sith acolytes and apprentices]] [[Category:Sith of the New Sith Wars]]
